import pytest


def test_login_succeeds():
    result = login("user", "pw")
    assert result.ok
    assert result.status == 200


def test_login_invalid_password_raises():
    with pytest.raises(AuthError):
        login("user", "wrong")


@pytest.mark.parametrize("bad", ["", None, "   "])
def test_login_empty_username_rejected(bad):
    assert login(bad, "pw").error == "missing username"
    assert login(bad, "pw").retries == 3
